description: This file controls how each town NPC manipulates their store prices. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: npc
columns.description: Points to the matching monstats.Id value. This should not be changed.

columns.name: buy mult
columns.description: Used to calculate the item's price when it is bought by the NPC from the player. This number is a fraction of 1024 in the following formula: [cost] * [.buy mult] / 1024

columns.name: sell mult
columns.description: Used to calculate the item's price when it is sold by the NPC to the player. This number is a fraction of 1024 in the following formula: [cost] * [.sell mult] / 1024

columns.name: rep mult
columns.description: Used to calculate the cost to repair an item. This number is a fraction of 1024 in the following formula: [cost] * [.rep mult] / 1024. This is then used to influence the repair cost based on the item durability and charges.

columns.name: questflag A
columns.description: If the player has this quest flag progress, then apply the relative additional price calculations

columns.name: questbuymult A
columns.description: Same functionality as the .buy mult field, except this relies on the .questflag field and applies after the .buy mult field calculation

columns.name: questsellmult A
columns.description: Same functionality as the .sell mult field, except this relies on the .questflag field and applies after the .sell mult field calculation

columns.name: questrepmult A
columns.description: Same functionality as the .rep mult field, except this relies on the .questflag field and applies after the .rep mult field calculation

columns.name: questflag B
columns.description: If the player has this quest flag progress, then apply the relative additional price calculations

columns.name: questbuymult B
columns.description: Same functionality as the .buy mult field, except this relies on the .questflag field and applies after the .buy mult field calculation

columns.name: questsellmult B
columns.description: Same functionality as the .sell mult field, except this relies on the .questflag field and applies after the .sell mult field calculation

columns.name: questrepmult B
columns.description: Same functionality as the .rep mult field, except this relies on the .questflag field and applies after the .rep mult field calculation

columns.name: questflag C
columns.description: If the player has this quest flag progress, then apply the relative additional price calculations

columns.name: questbuymult C
columns.description: Same functionality as the .buy mult field, except this relies on the .questflag field and applies after the .buy mult field calculation

columns.name: questsellmult C
columns.description: Same functionality as the .sell mult field, except this relies on the .questflag field and applies after the .sell mult field calculation

columns.name: questrepmult C
columns.description: Same functionality as the .rep mult field, except this relies on the .questflag field and applies after the .rep mult field calculation

columns.name: max buy
columns.description: Sets the maximum price that the NPC will pay, when the player sells an item in Normal Difficulty, Nightmare Difficulty, and Hell Difficulty, respectively

columns.name: max buy (N)
columns.description: Sets the maximum price that the NPC will pay, when the player sells an item in Normal Difficulty, Nightmare Difficulty, and Hell Difficulty, respectively

columns.name: max buy (H)
columns.description: Sets the maximum price that the NPC will pay, when the player sells an item in Normal Difficulty, Nightmare Difficulty, and Hell Difficulty, respectively
